title: neltuma constricta
intro: Neltuma constricta, also known as Neltuma or Neltuma plant, is a species of plant in the family Aristolochiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neltuma constricta include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Neltuma constricta is typically prepared as a tea or a tincture, although its preparation and uses may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
